languages.text: "Патис Руб из Несущих Слово, предводитель боевого отряда, прибывшего в регион на поиски одного из осколков Последнего рассвета. Недолго пробыл его обладателем — экстракция произошла вскоре после обретения искомого".

traits.locale_text: "Патис Руб из Несущих Слово, предводитель исследовательского отряда, прибывшего в регион на поиски одного из осколков Последнего рассвета. Недолго пробыл его обладателем — экстракция произошла вскоре после обретения искомого".

languages.text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."
languages.original_text: "Патис Руб из Несущих Слово, предводитель боевого отряда, прибывшего в регион на поиски одного из осколков Последнего рассвета. Недолго пробыл его обладателем — экстракция произошла вскоре после обретения искомого".

traits.locale_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

"Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a research team that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

"Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a research team that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

"Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

languages.text: “怀言者帕提斯·鲁贝，他曾率领一个战团来到此区域，寻找终末黎明的一块碎片。他拥有它的时间并不长。因为他刚得手不久，就被提取了。”
languages.original_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

traits.locale_text: “怀言者帕提斯·鲁贝，他曾率领一个战团来到此区域，寻找终末黎明的一块碎片。他拥有它的时间并不长。因为他刚得手不久，就被提取了。”

languages.text: « Patis Rube des Word Bearers, qui fut à la tête d'une escouade envoyée dans la région en quête de l'un des fragments de l'Aube finale. Il ne l'a pas conservé bien longtemps : l'extraction est survenue peu de temps après son acquisition. »
languages.original_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

traits.locale_text: « Patis Rube des Word Bearers, qui fut à la tête d'une escouade envoyée dans la région en quête de l'un des fragments de l'Aube finale. Il ne l'a pas conservé bien longtemps : l'extraction est survenue peu de temps après son acquisition. »

languages.text: «Patis Rube, de los Portadores de la Palabra, líder de una banda de guerreros que vino a la región en busca de uno de los fragmentos del Amanecer Final. No estuvo mucho tiempo en sus manos, ya que la extracción tuvo lugar al poco de que lo obtuviera».
languages.original_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

traits.locale_text: «Patis Rube, de los Portadores de la Palabra, líder de una banda de guerreros que vino a la región en busca de uno de los fragmentos del Amanecer Final. No estuvo mucho tiempo en sus manos, ya que la extracción tuvo lugar al poco de que lo obtuviera».

languages.text: "Nihai Şafak parçalarından birini aramak üzere bölgeye giden bir savaş grubunun lideri, Vahyedenler'den Patis Rube. Bulduğu parçayı kullanmaya pek vakti olmadı. Elde ettikten kısa bir süre sonra el konulma işlemi gerçekleşti."
languages.original_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

traits.locale_text: "Nihai Şafak parçalarından birini aramak üzere bölgeye giden bir savaş grubunun lideri, Vahyedenler'den Patis Rube. Bulduğu parçayı kullanmaya pek vakti olmadı. Elde ettikten kısa bir süre sonra el konulma işlemi gerçekleşti."

languages.text: "Patis Rube von den Word Bearers, Anführer eines Kriegstrupps, das auf der Suche nach einem Splitter der Letzten Dämmerung in diese Region reiste. Er hatte ihn nicht lange ... die Extraktion erfolgte kurz nachdem er in seinen Besitz gelangt war."
languages.original_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

traits.locale_text: "Patis Rube von den Word Bearers, Anführer eines Kriegstrupps, das auf der Suche nach einem Splitter der Letzten Dämmerung in diese Region reiste. Er hatte ihn nicht lange ... die Extraktion erfolgte kurz nachdem er in seinen Besitz gelangt war."

languages.text: 「ワード・ベアラーズの「パティス・ルーベ」は、最終の夜明けの破片を求めてこの地域にやってきた戦団のリーダー。彼はそれを長く持っていなかった。その奪取は彼がそれを手に入れた直後に行われた。」
languages.original_text: "Patis Rube of the Word Bearers, leader of a warband that travelled to the region in search of one of the shards of the Final Dawn. He did not possess it for long — the extraction occurred shortly after he acquired it."

traits.locale_text: 「ワード・ベアラーズの「パティス・ルーベ」は、最終の夜明けの破片を求めてこの地域にやってきた戦団のリーダー。彼はそれを長く持っていなかった。その奪取は彼がそれを手に入れた直後に行われた。」
